business.name: Niro Tharmakulasingam - RE/MAX Community Realty
business.legalName: Remax Community Real Estate Services Ltd.
business.title: Broker

hours.note: Also states 24 hours 7 days a week

services.name: Home Buying
services.description: Full-service buyer representation including first-time homebuyers, helping find properties that exceed expectations

services.name: Home Selling
services.description: Strategic marketing through internet, social media, MLS to maximize sale price. First-time seller support included.

services.name: Investment Properties
services.description: Investment property analysis and acquisition assistance

services.name: Home Staging
services.description: Professional full-range home staging services to make properties look their best during sales without renovation costs

services.name: Real Estate Appraisal
services.description: Assistance with property appraisal reports for purchasing or refinancing

services.name: Mortgage Assistance
services.description: Team of mortgage brokers providing free consultations for mortgage questions

services.name: Second Mortgage & Refinancing
services.description: Second mortgage services and refinancing/purchase assistance

services.name: Comparative Market Analysis
services.description: Free home evaluation and comparative market analysis

services.name: Digital Transaction Management
services.description: Faster transactions using DocuSign Rooms technology

taglines: The Right Broker Makes The Difference

testimonials.quote: Niro was a referral from one of my friends and we found him to be extremely professional and experienced. We chose him to buy and sell our home and had the most amazing experience.
testimonials.author: John McCain

testimonials.quote: By far Niro is the best Professional Realtor in GTA! He works hard for his clients and he never gives up until the best results are achieved.
testimonials.author: Taylor Quinn

testimonials.quote: It was such a pleasure working with Niro Tharmakulasingam, who seems to have all the answers for first time homebuyers. Very helpful and knowledgeable person. Good at negotiating.
testimonials.author: Verified Client

testimonials.quote: Niro truly lives up to his reputation and words. He is very much knowledgeable and experienced.
testimonials.author: Ushananthy Ananthasivam

testimonials.quote: Niro provides exceptional professional real estate service to sell our house even in a buyer's market.
testimonials.author: Tahir Hussain

testimonials.quote: Niro Thrama is one of the best realtors in the business. He is a very professional and knowledgeable realtor.
testimonials.author: Verified Client
